metadata.description: Kanban board for Price Charting API Integration for Game Pricing. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.epicTitle: Price Charting API Integration for Game Pricing
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task. Broken-down subtasks should be added based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md

tasks.title: Price Charting API Integration for Game Pricing
tasks.description: Integrate Price Charting API to fetch real-time market prices for video games based on title, platform, and condition.
tasks.userStory: As a store owner, I want real-time market prices for games from Price Charting API so that I can value trade-ins accurately.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a game item, when user requests price lookup, then system calls Price Charting API with game title and platform
Given API response, when price data is received, then system parses and stores price information (loose, CIB, new prices)
Given API call fails, when error occurs, then system handles gracefully with error message and fallback pricing if available
Given API rate limits, when rate limit is approached, then system implements rate limiting and queues requests
Given price data, when displayed, then prices are shown for different conditions (loose, CIB, new) with last updated timestamp
Given API integration, when configured, then API key is securely stored and used for all requests
tasks.businessValue: Provides accurate market pricing for games, enabling profitable trade-in valuations. Critical for trade-in feature.
tasks.technicalNotes: Implement Price Charting API client. Handle rate limiting (check API docs for limits). Cache price data to reduce API calls. Store API responses with timestamps. Implement retry logic for failed requests.
successMetrics: API success rate: 95%+ of price lookups succeed
Price accuracy: Prices match Price Charting website within 5%
Response time: 90%+ of lookups complete in <3 seconds
businessRules: API key must be configured per company (or globally)
Rate limiting: Respect Price Charting API rate limits
Price data is cached for 24 hours to reduce API calls
Fallback to manual pricing if API is unavailable
Prices shown for: loose, complete (CIB), new conditions
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks should be broken down into 1-2 day units based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md
